role: Rust binary `meta-mcp`: a stdio JSON-RPC MCP server (protocol 2024-11-05) exposing meta multi-repo operations (workspace state, projects, git, dependency graph, exec) to AI assistants. Built directly on path deps ../meta_core and ../meta_cli as a Cargo workspace member (version.workspace = true).
northstar: Meta makes multi-repo feel like monorepo without the downsides; the canon machinery stays green, versioned by the parent distribution.
next_command: Plan in kb first (git kb board); mint execution cards via hf (ADR-0003)
